subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In the shadow of oneness, certain leaves have been gathered together who have become the glory of men, God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در ظل وحدانیت ورقاتی محشور شدند که فخر رجال گشتند انشاءالله
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
